history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right. The cell directly in front (row 02, column C) is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. I need to change direction. Turning clockwise will make me face down, allowing me to move south along column B, which is clear of lava and walls. This is the first step in a planned route to reach the goal at row 08, column H.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (3,B) is floor, so I can safely move south to begin my journey toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column B facing down. The cell directly in front (row 4, column B) is floor, so I can move down safely. This is the first step toward reaching row 8, where I will later turn right to navigate through safe cells to the goal at row 8, column H.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column B, facing down. To reach the goal at (8,H), I plan to first go straight down to row 8, then turn right to move to column D, then go up to row 4, then right to column F, then up to row 2, then right to column H, then down to row 8. My immediate next step is to move forward down to row 5, which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (5,B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (6,B) is floor, so it's safe to move forward. My plan is to proceed down to row8, then move east across row8 to column D, then north to row4, then east to column F, then north to row2, then east to column H, then south to row8 to reach the goal. The next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 7, column B) is safe (floor). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 8, column H. I plan to go down to row 8, then right through the corridor, then up to row 2, then right to column H, then down to the goal. This step is the first move.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at cell (7,B) facing down. The cell directly in front (south) is (8,B), which is a floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal by allowing me to then head east. This is a safe move.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 08, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 08, column H (O). To reach it, I need to move east first, but there is lava at (8,5). I need to navigate via the safe corridors. The only way to cross from column B to column D is at row 8 via cells (8,3) and (8,4). Then I must go north up column D to row 4, then east to column F via row 4, then north to row 2, then east to column H, then south to row 8. My first step is to change orientation to face east (right) from facing down. Turning counter-clockwise (GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO) will achieve that.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column B, facing right (indicated by '>'). The goal is at row 08 column H. The direct path along row 8 is blocked by lava at columns E and G. I need to navigate around these obstacles. My planned route: move forward to (8,C), then to (8,D); go up column D to (4,D); turn right to (4,E) and (4,F); go up to (2,F); turn right to (2,G) and (2,H); then go down column H to (8,H). The first step is to move forward to (8,C), which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column C, facing right. The cell directly in front (08,D) is a safe floor cell. Moving forward will bring me one step closer to the goal at (08,H). I will then need to navigate around the lava cells by going upward, but for now, moving forward is the best immediate action.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08, column D, facing right. The goal is at row 08, column H, but directly to the right is lava at (8,E). I need to find a safe path. I plan to go up along column D to row04, then right to column F via row04's safe east-west connections (D->E->F), then up to row02, then right to column H via row02's safe connections (F->G->H), then down to the goal. My next step is to rotate counter-clockwise to face up.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell D8 facing up (north). To reach the goal at H8, I need to navigate around lava cells. The direct path east is blocked by lava at E8 and G8. I can go north along column D to row4, then east across row4 (since E4 is safe) to column F, then north to row2, then east to H2, then south to H8. The first step is to move north to D7, which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (07, D) facing up. The goal is at (08, H). To reach it, I need to navigate through safe cells. A possible path is to go up to row 4, then right to cross to column F via row4 E, then up to row2, then right to column H via row2 G, then down to the goal. My first move is to go forward (up) to (06, D), which is a safe empty cell.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column D, facing up. The goal is at row 08, column H. I plan to move up to row 04, then turn right to cross to column F via row 04's safe E cell, then move up to row 02, cross to column H, then move down to goal. My next step is to move forward to the safe cell at (05,D).
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row5 column D facing north. The cell directly ahead (row4 colD) is empty, so I can move forward to get closer to the goal. I need to eventually go east via row4 colE and then north to row2, then east to row2 colH, then south to goal at row8 colH.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 4 column D facing up (^). To reach the goal at row 8 column H, I plan to first move right to (4,E) which is safe, then continue right to (4,F), then go up to (2,F), then right to (2,H), then down to (8,H). Since I am currently facing up, I need to turn clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column D, facing right. The goal is at row 08, column H. I can move forward to E4, which is safe, and then to F4. From F4, I can go up to F2, then right to H2 via G2, then down to H8. My first step is to move forward to E4.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column E facing right (east). The cell directly ahead is (4,F), which is a safe floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal by allowing me to then head north to reach the crossing at row 2.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row04 colF facing east. I need to move north to reach row2, then east to colH, then south to the goal at row08 colH. My first step is to rotate counter-clockwise to face up.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column F (4,F) facing up. The goal is at (8,H). The safest path is to go up along column F to row2, then cross right through column G at row2 (the only row where column G is safe), then go down column H to the goal. My immediate next step is to move forward from (4,F) to (3,F), which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column F, facing up (^). The cell directly ahead is row 02, column F, which is '.' (safe). To reach the goal at (08, H), I plan to go up to row 2, then move right to column H, then go down to row 8. Moving forward now is a good first step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column F, facing up (^). The goal is at row 08, column H. To reach it, I need to move right to column G, then to column H, then down. First, I need to rotate clockwise to face right, as the cell directly to my right (col G) is safe floor.
</thought>
<action>GIRA_HORARIO</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2 column F, facing right. The goal is at row 8 column H. I need to move to the right twice to reach column H, then turn down and move down six times to reach the goal. The cell directly in front of me (row2 colG) is safe (floor), so I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2 column G facing right. The goal is at row 8 column H. Moving forward to row 2 column H is safe (floor). After that, I can turn clockwise to face down and then move straight down column H to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column H, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08, column H (O). There is a clear vertical path of floor cells directly below me from row 03 to row 07, and then the goal at row 08. To move downward, I need to change my orientation to face down. From facing right, a clockwise turn (GIRA_HORARIO) will make me face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
